sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73542" key="o(mo/gambroi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμό-γαμβροι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n73542.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sons-in-law of the same person,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
